text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, I was supposed to cook for
everyone today...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I ended up burning everything... And they
were all so excited for my food too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be seriously exhausted to have made
such a huge cooking blunder. I should look into
adjusting her race schedule.
